text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, Seiun Sky and I will finally be
taking on the Twinkle Series... at least we're
supposed to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's our first day of training, but she invites me to
some early morning fishing for some reason.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sky reels in a big, encouraging catch. In racing,
just as in fishing, there's nothing more important
than preparing the right tools.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Is she a carefree delinquent or a scheming
tactician? My days chasing the "biggest catch"
with this elusive Umamusume begin!
